zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Saint Maur於大約1316年出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur44歲，母親Elena de la Zouche29歲。他於大約1340年與Muriel Lovel結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1351年在英國薩默塞特被列為member of parliament for somersetshire。他去世於1361年8月8日在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Saint Maur于大约1316年出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur44岁，母亲Elena de la Zouche29岁。他于大约1340年与Muriel Lovel结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1351年在英国薩默塞特被列为member of parliament for somersetshire。他去世于1361年8月8日在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Maur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ernesto, Ramon, Adela, Carlos, Eladio, Emilia, Estrella, Horacio, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Mario.  Italian Alessandra, Angelo, Cecilio, Cosimo, Gianfranco, Lorenzo, Mauro.
Catalan: from the personal name Mauri, Latin Maurus (see Mauro ).
Catalan and French (Occitan): probably from the personal name Malric (ancient Germanic Almaricus).

variants.name: Mauro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Domenic, Giuseppe, Antonio, Carmine, Carmelo, Domenico, Gaetano, Nino, Pasquale.

Italian (mainly southern): from the personal name Mauro, derived from the Latin personal and ethnic name Maurus, borne by various early Christian saints and meaning ‘Moor, North African’. Compare Moore and Moro .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

variants.name: Nicolas
meanings: From Late Greek. See Nicholas .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Saint Maur was born about 1316, in Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur, was 44 and his mother, Elena de la Zouche, was 29. He married Muriel Lovel about 1340. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1351, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for somersetshire in Somerset, England. He died on 8 August 1361, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Saint Maur est né environ 1316, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elena de la Zouche, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Muriel Lovel environ 1340. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1351, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for somersetshire à Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 8 août 1361, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Saint Maur um 1316 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur 44 und seine Mutter Elena de la Zouche 29. Er hat um 1340 Muriel Lovel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1351 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament for somersetshire in Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. August 1361 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Castle Cary, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Saint Maur è nato il circa 1316 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Elena de la Zouche, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Muriel Lovel circa 1340. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1351, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for somersetshire nel Somerset, England. Morì il 8 agosto 1361, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Saint Maurが約1316年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maurは44歳，母Elena de la Zoucheは29歳であった。約1340年にMuriel Lovelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1351年，イギリスソメルセトでの職業はmember of parliament for somersetshireと記録されている。彼は1361年8月8日にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Saint Maur(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de la Zouche(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1340년 Muriel Lovel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1351년, 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트에서 member of parliament for somersetshire이었다. 그는 1361년 8월 8일 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Saint Maur nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elena de la Zouche, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Muriel Lovel aproximadamente 1340. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1351, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for somersetshire em Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1361, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Saint Maur родился около 1316 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de la Zouche, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Muriel Lovel около 1340 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1351 году он работал по профессии member of parliament for somersetshire в местности сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 8 августа 1361 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

sm.from 1351 to 1360: mai le 1351 e o'o I le 1360

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Saint Maur nació aproximadamente 1316, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elena de la Zouche, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Muriel Lovel aproximadamente 1340. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1351, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for somersetshire en Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1361, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
